occurrence_sentence: With IBM already adopting Bluefors technology in their state-of-the-art systems, it's easy to imagine many other applications of KIDE at the heart of future quantum computing infrastructure.
One of the first companies to utilize this technology in a real-world, boundary pushing application is IBM.
